acceptance_evidence.evidence:
No nominal result exists in tracked evidence; smoke gate remains 'invalid'. Gate error: ORCA-residual smoke nominal gate failed:
- smoke summary missing required entries: ['residual_clipping_rate', 'guard_veto_rate', 'fallback_degraded_status', 'artifact_pointer_status']
- residual_clipping_rate must be numeric rate
- guard_veto_rate must be numeric rate
- fallback_degraded_status must be 'clear' before nominal escalation (got None)
- artifact_pointer_status must be durable/complete before nominal escalation (got None)
- nominal_escalation_allowed must be true
- success_rate below nominal smoke gate: 0.0000 < 0.8000
